message:
fix: use Labels (plural) in hook_slot_integration_test CreateOptions

CreateOptions.Label was renamed to Labels []string but this test file
was not updated, causing build failures that block CI on all PRs.

Cherry-picked from PR #2490.

Co-Authored-By: Chris Deal <DreadPirateRobertz@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
